title: selago rubromontana
intro: Selago rubromontana, also known as the Red-stemmed Selago, is a flowering plant species in the genus Selago, native to southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selago rubromontana include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for herbal remedies, and its essential oil can also be extracted for use in aromatherapy.
